0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Subpleural ground-glass opacities in the upper lobe posterior segment of the left lung

2.text: Subpleural ground-glass opacities in the anterior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Subpleural ground-glass opacities most prominent in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Minimal honeycomb appearances within ground-glass opacities in the lower lobes

5.text: 4.5 mm nonspecific nodule adjacent to the major fissure in the upper lobe posterior segment of the left lung

6.text: Thickening of the bronchial walls in the anterior segments of both upper lobes
